summary: Completed phases 1-6 of 15. All 6 files build with zero sorry and zero axioms. Next: phase 7 (Eliminations.lean, 902 lines). Key insight: scoped notation (F,G,H,P,S,U) in Cslib.Logic.Bimodal requires careful handling - use rw with int_truth simp lemmas instead of simp only [int_truth], and avoid single-letter variable names matching notation.

artifacts.summary: Phase 1: Foundation types and predicates (553 lines source -> ported)
Phase 2: Substitution and freshness with Infinite typeclass (235 lines source -> ported)
Phase 3: Integer arithmetic helpers (131 lines source -> ported)
Phase 4: Temporal duality (342 lines source -> ported)
Phase 5: Distributivity laws (188 lines source -> ported)
Phase 6: Negation equivalences over Z (159 lines source -> ported)

continuation_context.notes: Phase 7 (Eliminations.lean, 902 lines) is the largest non-hierarchy file with 8 elimination cases (though Cases 5-8 are deferred to NormalForm.lean in the source). KEY PORTING INSIGHTS: (1) Scoped notation F,G,H,P,S,U is active in child namespaces of Cslib.Logic.Bimodal. Avoid these as variable names. Use w,x,r,m,u instead. (2) Use rw [int_truth_neg, int_truth_or, int_truth_and, int_truth_all_future, int_truth_all_past] to reduce goals to clean propositional form. Do NOT use 'simp only [int_truth]' which unfolds Formula abbrevs (neg,and,or) to raw implications, breaking left/right/rcases. (3) The source uses int_truth_and_iff/int_truth_or_iff/int_truth_neg_iff which correspond exactly to our @[simp] lemmas int_truth_and/int_truth_or/int_truth_neg. (4) Freshness uses Finset.exists_notMem from Mathlib.Data.Set.Finite.Basic instead of concrete Atom.mk_fresh_injective. (5) Formula.neg/and/or/all_future/all_past/some_future/some_past are all abbrevs in cslib, not separate constructors.
